job.title: Cyber Security Risk Platform Engineer (Full stack) @ MAERSK (MH, IN)
job.description:
Cyber Security Risk Platform Engineer (Full stack)

Joining Maersk will embark you on a transformational journey with great opportunities for career development within a global organization. Risk is at the heart of our approach to cyber security in Maersk.

A globally focused shipping and transportation organization continues to drive an ambitious and complex change and transformational programme to deliver a service of excellence for its customers and clients worldwide. The Global CTIO has a mandate from the Maersk board to lead the Technology transformation of Maersk, enabling the Maersk business strategy to become the global integrator of container logistics through digitizing the Maersk business processes and customer engagement.
  
The Technology Function is fundamental to enabling the company’s transformation. We are recruiting world-class talent to ensure that the technology services are modernized, enabling Maersk to become a logistics integrator leveraging a competitive advantage through technology.

Job Purpose / Summary

Are you passionate about building products that solve real-world cyber security and business problems? At Maersk, Cyber Risk is central to enabling secure and resilient global operations. We are transforming how cyber risk is managed, moving beyond traditional GRC tooling towards modern platforms, automation, data-driven decision making and AI-enabled workflows. As a Cyber Risk Platform Engineer, you will design, build and evolve the tools and services used to identify, assess, manage and report cyber risk across one of the world's largest logistics organisations. Working at the intersection of software engineering, cyber security and risk, you will help create intuitive products that simplify complex processes, improve decision-making and enable teams across Maersk to manage risk more effectively.

Key Responsibilities:

* Design, build and operate modern software products, workflows and services that enable cyber risk management at global scale.
* Design and implement intuitive, user-centric GRC workflows and integrations which improve user experience, drive adoption, reduce friction and improve data quality.
* Evaluate and integrate emerging technologies, including AI-enabled workflows and automation capabilities, to enhance cyber risk management processes.
* Act as a technical Subject Matter Expert (SME) for tooling, including documentation and change management. Work closely with Cyber Security teams to understand their operations, processes and how we can better support operations.
* Contribute to the long-term product vision, architecture and roadmap for cyber risk platforms and services.
* Build effective relationships with key teams across the business and vendors.
* Drive continuous improvement in GRC processes, tooling and ways of working

Required Experience & Skills:

Essential:

* 3+ years of experience in designing and building software products, applications or platforms.
* Experience developing modern web applications using technologies such as React, Node.js, Postgres and cloud-native services.
* Experience with APIs and systems integration.
* Web application development experience.
* Experience with cloud-native technologies.
* CI/CD and DevOps practices.
* User-centric design mindset.
* Experience implementing AI technologies, either directly with large language models (LLMs) or through LLM wrapper tools.
* Stakeholder management

Desirable:

* Familiarity with technologies such as Azure, Terraform, Docker and Kubernetes would be advantageous.
* Experience working in a cyber security function
* Archer IRM
* Risk management processes

Personal Profile:

* Pragmatic and solution-oriented, able to maximise value from available tools.
* Strong stakeholder management and influencing skills across technical and non-technical audiences.
* Excellent communication skills, with the ability to translate complex topics into clear insights.
* Highly organised, able to manage multiple workstreams effectively.
* Collaborative team player with a proactive, “can-do” mindset.
* Committed to continuous improvement and professional growth.

You might be a great fit if you have previously worked as a:

* Software Engineer
* Full Stack Developer
* Platform Engineer
* Automation Engineer
* Product Engineer
* Internal Tools Developer
* Security Engineer
* DevOps Engineer

Previous experience in a dedicated GRC role is not required

Maersk is committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace, and we embrace different styles of thinking. Maersk is an equal opportunities employer and welcomes applicants without regard to race, colour, gender, sex, age, religion, creed, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, marital status, sexual orientation, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy or parental leave, veteran status, gender identity, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. We will consider qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with all legal requirements.

We are happy to support your need for any adjustments during the application and hiring process. If you need special assistance or an accommodation to use our website, apply for a position, or to perform a job, please contact us by emailing accommodationrequests@maersk.com .

job.title: Full Stack AI Developer @ Revvity (IN)
job.description:
Revvity

Revvity is a developer and provider of end-to-end solutions designed to help scientists, researchers, and clinicians solve the world’s greatest health challenges. We pair the enthusiasm of an industry disruptor with the experience of a longtime leader. Our team of 11,000+ colleagues from around the globe are vital to our success and the reason we’re able to push boundaries in pursuit of better human health.

Find your future at Revvity.

### **The Big Picture**

Join the RevvityAI development team to design, build, and improve software that helps power AI-driven capabilities. They will help translate product needs into reliable systems, contribute to model- and data-focused engineering, and support continuous improvement across the stack.

### **What's in it for you**

* Experience personalized career journeys with growth-oriented development opportunities.
* Engage in purpose-driven work that makes a positive impact on society.
* Be part of a values-driven culture that encourages collaboration and fresh ideas.
* Placeholder for local benefits

### **Your Superpowers in Action**

* Design, develop, and maintain AI-enabled applications and services using modern software engineering practices.
* Build and optimize data pipelines and machine learning workflows that improve performance, reliability, and usability.
* Collaborate with product and engineering partners to translate requirements into clear technical solutions.
* Write clean, testable code and help establish engineering standards for performance, security, and maintainability.
* Monitor deployed systems, troubleshoot issues, and iterate based on real-world feedback and metrics.

### **Basic qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
* Strong programming skills in at least one modern language such as Python, Java, or C#.
* Experience building software services using APIs, databases, and version control.

### **Preferred qualifications**

* Experience with machine learning or AI frameworks and developing production ML workflows.
* Familiarity with cloud services, containerization, and deployment practices.
* Experience with data engineering tasks such as ETL/ELT, data quality checks, and performance tuning.

job.title: Senior Full Stack Developer @ WebSenor (UP, IN)
job.description:
Senior Full Stack Developer (React.js + Node.js + Azure)

We are looking for an experienced **Senior Full Stack Developer** to design, develop, deploy, and maintain modern cloud-native web applications on **Microsoft Azure**. The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in **React.js, Node.js, Azure Cloud Services, Azure SQL Database, CI/CD pipelines, Terraform, and application monitoring**. You will be responsible for delivering end-to-end features, from design and development through deployment and production support.

Key ResponsibilitiesFull Stack Development

* Develop scalable, secure, and high-performance web applications using **React.js** and **Node.js**.
* Build responsive, user-friendly, and accessible UI components.
* Design and develop RESTful APIs and backend services.
* Create and optimize database schemas, stored procedures, and SQL queries.
* Build applications using cloud-native and microservices architecture.

Azure Cloud

* Deploy and manage applications on Microsoft Azure.
* Work with Azure App Services, Azure SQL Database, Azure Key Vault, Azure Storage, Azure Monitor, Application Insights, Virtual Networks, and Azure Entra ID.
* Implement cloud security best practices and identity management.

DevOps & CI/CD

* Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions or Azure DevOps.
* Automate deployments across multiple environments.
* Implement Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform.
* Manage source control, branching strategies, and release processes.

API Development & Integration

* Design and secure REST APIs.
* Integrate enterprise applications and third-party services.
* Implement authentication and authorization using OAuth and JWT.
* Optimize API performance and scalability.

Monitoring & Production Support

* Configure Azure Monitor and Application Insights.
* Build dashboards, alerts, and health monitoring solutions.
* Troubleshoot production issues and perform root cause analysis.
* Ensure application reliability, observability, and performance.

Technical Leadership

* Participate in solution architecture and technical design discussions.
* Conduct code reviews and promote secure coding practices.
* Create technical documentation and contribute to knowledge sharing.

Required SkillsFront-End

* React.js
* JavaScript / TypeScript
* HTML5 & CSS3
* Responsive UI Development
* Redux / Context API

Back-End

* Node.js
* Express.js
* REST API Development
* OAuth & JWT Authentication

Database

* Azure SQL Database
* SQL Performance Tuning
* Data Modeling
* Stored Procedures

Azure Cloud

* Azure App Service
* Azure SQL Database
* Azure Key Vault
* Azure Storage
* Azure Monitor
* Application Insights
* Azure Entra ID
* Virtual Networks

DevOps

* Git & GitHub
* GitHub Actions / Azure DevOps
* CI/CD Pipelines
* Terraform
* Infrastructure as Code (IaC)

Monitoring

* Azure Monitor
* Application Insights
* Log Analytics
* Alerting & Dashboards
* Production Support

Preferred Qualifications

* Experience building enterprise applications from scratch.
* Experience modernizing legacy applications.
* Exposure to Healthcare or Insurance domain.
* Knowledge of security and compliance standards (PII, HIPAA).
* Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments.
* Microsoft Azure Certifications are a plus.

Experience Required

* 8+ years of software development experience.
* 5+ years of experience with React.js and Node.js.
* 3+ years of experience deploying applications on Microsoft Azure.
* Experience managing applications through the complete development lifecycle, including production support.

Nice to Have

* Terraform
* Docker & Kubernetes
* API Gateway Management
* SonarQube
* Performance Testing
* Security Scanning
* Azure Front Door / Application Gateway

If you're passionate about building scalable cloud-native applications and enjoy working with modern Microsoft Azure technologies, we'd love to hear from you!

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Noida, Uttar Pradesh (Noida)

job.title: Software Development Intern (Corporate Internship Program) (TS, IN)
job.description:
The Software Development Internship is designed for aspiring software engineers who are passionate about technology and eager to build practical development skills.

As a Software Development Intern, you will work on real-world software projects, collaborate with experienced developers, participate in product development, and gain exposure to modern software engineering practices.

This internship provides an excellent opportunity to strengthen your technical knowledge while working in a professional corporate environment.

Internship Domains

Candidates may apply based on their area of interest and technical skills in one of the following domains:

* Python Full Stack Development
* MERN Stack Development
* Cloud Computing (AWS & Oracle Cloud)
* SQL & Database Management
* Artificial Intelligence Fundamentals
* UI/UX Design
* Project Management

Key Responsibilities

As a Software Development Intern, you will:

* Participate in the design and development of software applications.
* Develop, test, and maintain web applications.
* Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code.
* Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues.
* Work with databases and API integrations.
* Collaborate with developers, designers, and project managers.
* Participate in code reviews and technical discussions.
* Learn and implement industry best practices.
* Assist in testing, deployment, and application maintenance.
* Contribute to product enhancements and new feature development.
* Maintain project documentation and technical reports.

Eligibility Criteria

Applicants should meet the following requirements:

* Graduate or Postgraduate in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, MCA, BCA, B.Sc. (Computer Science), or related disciplines.
* Final-year students awaiting results may also apply.
* Fresh graduates are welcome.
* Basic programming knowledge in at least one modern programming language.
* Understanding of web technologies and databases is an added advantage.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
* Good communication and teamwork abilities.
* Passion for software development and continuous learning.

Preferred Technical Skills

Candidates with basic knowledge in any of the following will have an advantage:

* Python
* JavaScript
* React.js
* Node.js
* Express.js
* HTML5 & CSS3
* SQL / MySQL / PostgreSQL
* Git & GitHub
* REST APIs
* AWS / Oracle Cloud
* UI/UX Fundamentals
* Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning (Basic)

*Candidates are not expected to know all technologies. A strong willingness to learn and grow is highly valued.*

What You'll Learn

During the internship, you'll gain practical exposure to:

* Full Stack Web Development
* Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC)
* Version Control using Git
* Database Design & Management
* API Development & Integration
* Debugging & Performance Optimization
* Cloud Fundamentals
* Agile Development Methodologies
* Team Collaboration & Code Reviews
* Professional Software Engineering Practices

Internship Benefits

* Hands-on experience working on live software projects.
* Exposure to modern technologies and development tools.
* Mentorship from experienced software engineers.
* Opportunity to work in a collaborative corporate environment.
* Practical technical skill development.
* Internship Completion Certificate upon successful completion.
* Performance evaluation and technical feedback.
* Opportunity to be considered for full-time employment based on performance and organizational requirements.

Employment Opportunity

Outstanding interns may be considered for full-time positions such as:

* Software Engineer
* Python Developer
* MERN Stack Developer
* Full Stack Developer
* UI/UX Designer
* Cloud Associate
* Project Coordinator

Selected candidates may be offered a salary package ranging from **₹3.0 LPA to ₹4.5 LPA**, subject to technical evaluation, internship performance, and company requirements.

*Completion of the internship does not guarantee permanent employment.*

Internship Details

* **Duration:** 3 Months
* **Work Mode:** Work from Office
* **Working Hours:** 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
* **Location:** Madhapur, Hyderabad
* **Internship Type:** Unpaid

Pay: ₹3,000.00 - ₹32,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

job.title: Full Stack Web Developer @ Rediger Digitech (TS, IN)
job.description:
Job Title: Full Stack Web Developer

**Experience:** 3–5 Years  
**Employment Type:** Full-Time  
**Job Location:** Hyderabad / On-Site  
**Company:** Rediger Digitech Pvt. Ltd.  
**Industry:** Digital Marketing, Web Development and IT Services

Job Summary

Rediger Digitech Pvt. Ltd. is looking for an experienced and skilled **Full Stack Web Developer** with 3–5 years of hands-on experience in designing, developing, testing and maintaining responsive websites and web applications.

The ideal candidate should have strong knowledge of both front-end and back-end development, database management, API integration, website security, hosting and performance optimization. The candidate will work closely with designers, digital marketing professionals, SEO specialists and project managers to deliver high-quality web solutions for clients from different industries.

Key Responsibilities

* Develop responsive, user-friendly and high-performing websites and web applications.
* Handle both front-end and back-end development activities.
* Convert UI/UX designs, Figma files and PSD layouts into functional websites.
* Develop custom websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript and modern frameworks.
* Build and maintain websites using WordPress, WooCommerce and other CMS platforms.
* Customize WordPress themes and plugins based on client requirements.
* Develop secure and scalable back-end functionality.
* Create and integrate REST APIs and third-party services.
* Integrate payment gateways, WhatsApp, CRM, email marketing tools, Google Maps and social media platforms.
* Develop and manage e-commerce websites.
* Create product, cart, checkout, payment and order-management functionalities.
* Manage databases and ensure proper data storage, retrieval and security.
* Troubleshoot website bugs, technical issues and compatibility problems.
* Improve website speed, Core Web Vitals and overall performance.
* Ensure websites are mobile-friendly and compatible with major browsers.
* Implement basic technical SEO requirements, including proper heading structure, schema markup, XML sitemaps, redirects and clean URLs.
* Manage website hosting, domain configuration, SSL installation and website migration.
* Deploy websites on shared hosting, VPS, cloud platforms or production servers.
* Use Git or other version-control systems to manage source code.
* Conduct website testing before launch.
* Maintain proper project documentation and code standards.
* Provide ongoing website maintenance, updates and technical support.
* Coordinate with the graphic design, content, SEO and digital marketing teams.
* Communicate with clients to understand technical requirements when required.
* Complete assigned projects within agreed timelines.

Required Technical SkillsFront-End Development

* Strong knowledge of HTML5.
* Strong knowledge of CSS3.
* Strong knowledge of JavaScript.
* Experience with responsive web design.
* Experience with Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS or similar CSS frameworks.
* Knowledge of React.js, Vue.js or Angular is preferred.
* Ability to convert Figma, Adobe XD or PSD designs into responsive webpages.
* Understanding of cross-browser compatibility.
* Knowledge of website accessibility and modern UI standards.

Back-End Development

The candidate should have strong experience in at least one of the following technologies:

* PHP and Laravel
* Node.js and Express.js
* Python and Django
* Other modern back-end frameworks

Additional requirements:

* Strong understanding of server-side programming.
* Experience with authentication and authorization.
* Experience developing admin panels and dashboards.
* Knowledge of session management, cookies and secure login systems.
* Ability to develop reusable and scalable code.

WordPress and CMS Development

* Strong experience in WordPress website development.
* Experience with Elementor, Elementor Pro, WPBakery, Gutenberg or similar page builders.
* Experience customizing WordPress themes.
* Experience customizing or developing WordPress plugins.
* Knowledge of WooCommerce website development.
* Experience with custom post types and custom fields.
* Familiarity with Advanced Custom Fields is preferred.
* Ability to resolve WordPress errors, plugin conflicts and theme issues.
* Experience in WordPress security, backup and migration.

Database Skills

* Strong knowledge of MySQL.
* Understanding of database design and optimization.
* Ability to write and manage SQL queries.
* Experience with MongoDB, PostgreSQL or other databases is an advantage.
* Knowledge of database backup, recovery and security.

API and Third-Party Integration

* Experience developing and integrating REST APIs.
* Knowledge of JSON and AJAX.
* Experience integrating payment gateways such as Razorpay, PayU, Stripe or PayPal.
* Experience with Google Maps API.
* Experience integrating WhatsApp, SMS and email APIs.
* Experience connecting websites with CRM and marketing automation platforms.
* Knowledge of social media API integrations is preferred.

Hosting and Deployment

* Knowledge of domain and DNS management.
* Experience with cPanel and hosting control panels.
* Experience installing and managing SSL certificates.
* Ability to migrate websites between servers.
* Basic knowledge of Linux servers.
* Familiarity with VPS, AWS, DigitalOcean, Hostinger, GoDaddy or similar hosting services.
* Knowledge of CI/CD and cloud deployment is an added advantage.

Website Performance and Security

* Experience optimizing website loading speed.
* Knowledge of image optimization, caching and code minification.
* Understanding of Google PageSpeed Insights and Core Web Vitals.
* Knowledge of website security best practices.
* Experience protecting websites from malware, spam and unauthorized access.
* Knowledge of backup and disaster-recovery processes.
* Understanding of OWASP security principles is preferred.

SEO Knowledge

* Basic understanding of on-page and technical SEO.
* Ability to create SEO-friendly website structures.
* Knowledge of meta tags, canonical tags, robots.txt and XML sitemaps.
* Ability to implement redirects and fix broken links.
* Knowledge of schema markup is preferred.
* Familiarity with Google Search Console and Google Analytics is an advantage.

Software and Tools

The candidate should be familiar with:

* Visual Studio Code or similar code editors
* Git, GitHub, GitLab or Bitbucket
* Figma or Adobe XD
* Postman
* Chrome Developer Tools
* cPanel and hosting dashboards
* Google Search Console
* Google Analytics
* PageSpeed Insights
* WordPress and WooCommerce
* Project-management tools such as Trello, Asana, ClickUp or Jira

Required Qualifications

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering or a related field.
* Candidates with relevant professional experience and a strong portfolio may also apply.
* Minimum 3 years and maximum 5 years of relevant full stack web-development experience.
* Strong portfolio of completed websites or web applications.
* Experience working independently and as part of a development team.
* Experience handling multiple projects simultaneously.

Preferred Qualifications

* Experience working in a digital marketing agency or web-development company.
* Experience developing corporate, healthcare, e-commerce, real estate, education and service-based websites.
* Knowledge of mobile application development is an added advantage.
* Knowledge of React Native or Flutter is an added advantage.
* Familiarity with cloud technologies and DevOps processes is preferred.
* Knowledge of AI tools and AI integrations for websites is an advantage.
* Experience mentoring junior developers is preferred.

Soft Skills

* Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
* Good communication skills.
* Ability to understand client requirements.
* Strong attention to detail.
* Ability to meet project deadlines.
* Good time-management skills.
* Ability to work independently.
* Willingness to learn new technologies.
* Positive attitude and team-oriented approach.
* Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities.

Candidate Responsibilities During Selection

Applicants should be prepared to:

* Share a portfolio of completed websites and web applications.
* Explain their role in previous projects.
* Complete a technical interview.
* Complete a practical coding or website-development assignment.
* Demonstrate knowledge of front-end, back-end, database and deployment processes.

What We Offer

* Competitive salary based on experience and technical skills.
* Opportunity to work on projects from multiple industries.
* Professional and collaborative working environment.
* Career-growth opportunities.
* Exposure to website development, digital marketing, SEO and emerging technologies.
* Opportunity to work on custom websites, e-commerce platforms and web applications.

Application Details

Interested candidates can apply by sharing the following:

* Updated resume
* Current salary
* Expected salary
* Notice period
* Current location
* Portfolio or website links
* GitHub profile, if available

**Job Type:** Full-Time  
**Experience Required:** 3–5 Years  
**Work Location:** Hyderabad / On-Site

Pay: ₹450,000.00 - ₹480,000.00 per year

Work Location: In person

job.title: Senior Dot Net Developer @ Next Big Technology (RJ, IN)
job.description:
We're Hiring: Senior .NET Developer

**Position:** Senior .NET Developer  
**Experience:** 5+ Years  
**Location:** Bengaluru, Karnataka  
**Work Mode:** Hybrid (2–3 Days/Week from Office)  
**Notice Period:** Immediate Joiners Only

About the Role

We are looking for a highly skilled **Senior .NET Developer** to join our growing engineering team. If you have strong expertise in the Microsoft technology stack, Azure cloud services, and building scalable enterprise applications, we'd love to connect with you.

Required Technical SkillsCore Development

* Strong hands-on experience with **.NET Core** and **.NET Framework**
* Expertise in developing and consuming **RESTful APIs**
* Experience implementing **JWT Authentication & Authorization**
* Strong understanding of **Multithreading** and **Asynchronous Programming**
* Ability to write clean, maintainable, and scalable code following **SOLID Principles**

Database & Cloud

* Advanced knowledge of **Microsoft SQL Server**
* Expertise in writing complex SQL queries
* Strong experience debugging and optimizing **Stored Procedures**
* Hands-on experience with **Microsoft Azure** services, deployments, and cloud infrastructure

Front-End

* Basic to intermediate knowledge of **Angular** for effective collaboration with front-end teams and UI integration

Key Responsibilities

* Design, develop, and maintain enterprise-grade .NET applications
* Build secure, scalable, and high-performance REST APIs
* Optimize SQL queries and troubleshoot complex stored procedures
* Deploy and manage applications on Microsoft Azure
* Collaborate with cross-functional Agile teams to deliver high-quality software
* Ensure application security, reliability, and scalability using industry best practices

Preferred Candidate

* 5+ years of professional experience in .NET development
* Strong problem-solving and debugging skills
* Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills
* Available to join immediately

**Location:** Bengaluru (Hybrid)

**Notice Period:** Immediate Joiners Only

**Interested candidates can share their updated resume at:** **hr@nextbigtechnology.com**  
**contact- 7357457770**

job.title: Senior Software Engineer @ Wells Fargo (TS, IN)
job.description:
* **About this role:**  
  Wells Fargo is seeking a Senior Software Engineer.  
  We believe in the power of working together because great ideas can come from anyone. Through collaboration, any employee can have an impact and make a difference for the entire company. Explore opportunities with us for a career in a supportive environment where you can learn and grow.  
    
  **In this role, you will:**

* Lead moderately complex initiatives and deliverables within technical domain environments
* Contribute to large scale planning of strategies
* Design, code, test, debug, and document for projects and programs associated with technology domain, including upgrades and deployments
* Review moderately complex technical challenges that require an in-depth evaluation of technologies and procedures
* Resolve moderately complex issues and lead a team to meet existing client needs or potential new clients needs while leveraging solid understanding of the function, policies, procedures, or compliance requirements
* Collaborate and consult with peers, colleagues, and mid-level managers to resolve technical challenges and achieve goals
* Lead projects and act as an escalation point, provide guidance and direction to less experienced staff  
    
  **Required Qualifications:**
* 4+ years of Software Engineering experience, or equivalent demonstrated through one or a combination of the following: work experience, training, military experience, education  
    
  **Desired Qualifications:**
* 4+ years of Software Engineering experience, Full stack Developer
* 4+ years of Java 17, Spring Boot experience
* 4+ years of RESTful or SOAP web services
* 4+ years of Agular experience
* 3+ years of Apache Kafka
* 4+ years of Oracle DB & SQL Server experience
* 4+ years of SQL server experience or 5+ years of Oracle experience
* 4+ Test Frameworks Selenium, Cucumber, TestNG
* 4+ SDLC Process Agile Methodology - Scrum Framework
* 4+ years' experience in GitHub, Jenkins, Artifactory, Sonar, Maven or Gradle, Checkmarx, Blackduck, JIRA
* 4+ years of experience in developing JUnit test cases
* Azure/Google/Pivotal Cloud application development
* Microservice based application, Microservice principles and Patterns
* Working knowledge of Unix, Linux, Postman
* Working knowledge of APM tools such as Splunk, ELK, Grafana, Prometheus etc.
* Working knowledge of AI Coding Assistant tools like CoPilot
* Good written and verbal communication skills, experience with MS Office and Teams.  
    
  **Job Expectations:**
* Candidate should be a full stack developer and would have implemented a large complex application
* Candidate should have implemented Microservice based application
* Experience in Test Driven Development and Behavioral Driven Development
* Working experience in SDLC process of application development on Agile - Scrum Team
* Candidate should have working experience in Middleware application development.
* Working Experience in automated CI/CD for build and deployment of application using Jenkins and UCD.
* Working experience in cloud native application.

**Posting End Date:**

19 Jul 2026

* ***Job posting may come down early due to volume of applicants.***

**We Value Equal Opportunity**

Wells Fargo is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, status as a protected veteran, or any other legally protected characteristic.

Employees support our focus on building strong customer relationships balanced with a strong risk mitigating and compliance-driven culture which firmly establishes those disciplines as critical to the success of our customers and company. They are accountable for execution of all applicable risk programs (Credit, Market, Financial Crimes, Operational, Regulatory Compliance), which includes effectively following and adhering to applicable Wells Fargo policies and procedures, appropriately fulfilling risk and compliance obligations, timely and effective escalation and remediation of issues, and making sound risk decisions. There is emphasis on proactive monitoring, governance, risk identification and escalation, as well as making sound risk decisions commensurate with the business unit’s risk appetite and all risk and compliance program requirements.

Candidates applying to job openings posted in Canada: Applications for employment are encouraged from all qualified candidates, including women, persons with disabilities, aboriginal peoples and visible minorities. Accommodation for applicants with disabilities is available upon request in connection with the recruitment process.

**Applicants with Disabilities**

To request a medical accommodation during the application or interview process, visit Disability Inclusion at Wells Fargo.

**Drug and Alcohol Policy**

Wells Fargo maintains a drug free workplace. Please see our Drug and Alcohol Policy to learn more.

**Wells Fargo Recruitment and Hiring Requirements:**

a. Third-Party recordings are prohibited unless authorized by Wells Fargo.

b. Wells Fargo requires you to directly represent your own experiences during the recruiting and hiring process.

job.title: Sr Engineer, Software Development @ LPL Financial Global Capability Center (TS, IN)
job.description:
**Where Ambition Meets Innovation**

At LPL’s Global Capability Center, you'll find a collaborative culture where your voice matters, integrity guides every decision, and technology fuels progress. Your skills, talents, and ideas will redefine what's possible. LPL's success reflects its exceptional employees, who together pursue one noble purpose: empowering financial advisors to deliver personalized advice for all who need it. We’re proud to be expanding and reaching new heights in Hyderabad.

Join us as we create something extraordinary together.

**Job Overview:**  
We are looking for an inspired Sr. Developer/Tech Lead Developer with a background in development of web applications leveraging technologies including C#, JavaScript, jQuery, and Angular. With LPL you will have the opportunity to be part of a team transforming user experiences with self-service features that enable and empower our advisors in support of the LPL Risk & Compliance domain.

**Responsibilities:**

* Deep understanding and seasoned on Web UI development using Container frameworks
* Develop end to end design for the platform, solution delivery and execution and code quality
* Web Based UI Performance Tuning industry best solution design
* Collaborate with peer teams, technology platform owner, product manager/owner, enterprise architecture and platform support teams to ensure delivery of production into Production
* Working on Agile projects with CI/CD
* Work collaboratively with quality assurance engineer teams, DevOps to ensure all SDLC processes are adhered to
* Assess opportunities for platform/application and process improvements
* Maintain, troubleshoot, optimize and enhance existing systems
* Hands on Web and C#/ Net development experience integrating multiple application platforms
* Communicate effectively with cross-functional stakeholders and application integration partners
* Application resiliency, scalability and performance design

**What are we looking for?**

We’re looking for strong collaborators who deliver exceptional client experiences and thrive in fast-paced, team-oriented environments. Our ideal candidates **pursue greatness**, **act with integrity**, and are **driven to help our clients succeed**. We value those who embrace creativity, continuous improvement, and contribute to a culture where we **win together** and **create and share joy** in our work.

**Requirements:**

* 8+ years of experience designing and developing complex web applications and services using the .NET technology stack, including REST and SOAP services.
* 5+ years of experience as a Full Stack Developer and 3+ years of experience with Angular (preferably Angular 15+), including C#, HTML5, JavaScript, CSS3, Bootstrap, JSON, and web/service-oriented application development.
* Experience with SQL Server and Oracle databases, including stored procedures, views, indexes, query execution, and performance tuning.
* Experience with SOA principles, design patterns, code architecture, REST services, Node.js, and AWS-based application development and deployment.
* Experience with development and DevOps tools, including GitHub, Liquibase, Visual Studio, Visio, Postman, and SoapUI.
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field.

**Core Competencies:**

* Application architecture and design.
* Analysis, troubleshooting, and resolution of production or critical incidents.
* Verbal and written communication.
* Collaboration and independent problem-solving.
* Adaptability and continuous learning of new technologies.

**Preferences:**

* Experience writing unit tests using any of these technologies VS Tests, NUnit, JUnit, MUnit, Jasmin/Karma is a plus
* Snowflake experience
* Team City, Octopus, Jira
* Hands on experience implementing self-service portals
* Experience developing customer service applications
* Knowledge of estimation, tools and principles
* Exposure to Cloud based application design and implementation

LPL Global Business Services, LLP - PRIVACY POLICY

About the Role : We are seeking an experienced and highly motivated Lead Full Stack Developer to join our growing engineering team in Hyderabad. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience designing, developing, and deploying scalable web applications while leading technical teams and driving best engineering practices. As a Lead Full Stack Developer, you will be responsible for the end-to-end software development lifecycle, mentoring developers, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and delivering high-quality solutions for enterprise-scale applications.

Optimize application performance and troubleshoot production issues. \* Participate in sprint planning, estimations, and technical discussions. Implement CI/CD pipelines and DevOps best practices. Ensure application security, scalability, and reliability. \* Stay up to date with emerging technologies and recommend improvements.

Strong knowledge of SQL and NoSQL databases. \* Experience with AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud. Hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes. \* Experience using Git and CI/CD tools such as Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or Azure DevOps. \* Strong understanding of software architecture, design patterns, and system scalability. \* Excellent problem-solving and leadership skills.

Preferred Skills \* Experience leading engineering teams. \* Knowledge of Agile/Scrum methodologies. \* Experience with distributed systems. \* Familiarity with event-driven architecture. \* Exposure to AI-enabled applications is a plus. ## Required Technical Skills \* React.js / Angular / Vue.js \* Node.js / Java / .NET / Python \* JavaScript / TypeScript \* HTML5 / CSS3 \* REST APIs \* Microservices \* SQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server) \* MongoDB \* Redis \* Docker \* Kubernetes \* AWS / Azure / GCP \* Git \* CI/CD \* Unit Testing \* Agile Scrum ## What We Offer \* Competitive salary \* Performance bonuses \* Health insurance \* Paid leave \* Professional development opportunities \* Collaborative work environment \* Career growth opportunities ## Job Location Hyderabad, Telangana (Work from Office / Hybrid) ## How to Apply Apply through Indeed with your updated resume. job.title: Engineering Manager @ Sterlite Technologies Ltd (GJ, IN)
job.description:
Job ID: 888717

1 Opening

Ahmedabad

### **Role description**

**Job Title:**Engineering Manager

**Location:** Ahmedabad| **Experience:** 10+Years

Work Mode: WFO

**Who We Are** at **STL Digital**, we don’t just build software; we engineer digital transformations. We partner with global enterprises with a comprehensive portfolio of services, including Product Engineering, Cloud and Cybersecurity, Data and AI, and Enterprise SaaS.We’re hiring a **hands-on Engineering Manager** to lead and actively build the core of our voice communications stack. You will be a **player-coach**: owning critical **VoIP/SIP/C++** development while guiding developers across multiple components and languages (**PHP, JavaScript/Node.js, Java/Spring Boot, Struts, Perl**, databases, and Linux infrastructure).

This role is ideal for someone who can confidently dive into SIP traces and C++ code

**Required Qualifications**

* **10+ years** building production systems in **VoIP / SIP** environments, with proven troubleshooting experience.
* **Strong C++** development experience (modern C++ preferred), including debugging and performance analysis in Linux
* Deep protocol understanding: **SIP**, **SDP**, **RTP/RTCP** (and common VoIP failure modes)
* Strong Linux and networking fundamentals (Ubuntu, system tuning, sockets, firewall/NAT behavior, TLS basics)
* Experience integrating or operating SIP/media components such as:

  + **Asterisk** (dialplan/call flows, AMI/ARI familiarity is a plus)
  + **OpenSIPS/OpenSIP** or similar SIP proxy/SBC stacks (Kamailio, FreeSWITCH, etc.)
* Demonstrated ability to lead engineers across a mixed stack (backend + UI) through code reviews and technical direction
* Clear communication skills—able to explain complex VoIP issues to non-VoIP engineers and stakeholders

  

### **About STL and STL Digital**

About STL - STL is a leading global optical and digital solutions company providing advanced offerings to build 5G, Rural, FTTx, Enterprise and Data Centre networks. About STL Digital - STL Digital, a wholly owned subsidiary of STL, is a global IT services and consulting company dedicated to delivering exceptional digital transformation experiences for enterprises with a comprehensive portfolio of services, including product engineering, cloud and cyber security, data and AI, and enterprise SaaS.

job.title: Full Stack Developer @ BMC Software (MH, IN)
job.description:
Basic Information
  
  
Job Name
  
Product Developer I - India
  
  
Country
  
India
  
  
State
  
IN\_Maharashtra
  
  
City
  
Pune

14-Jul-2026
  
  
Job ID
  
47294
  
  
Travel
  
You may occasionally be required to travel for business
  
  
Secondary locations
  
IND Bangalore - Prestige Summit, IND Chennai - Indiqube
  
  
Looking for details about our benefits?
  
  
Description and Requirements
  
  
**Hybrid:** #LI-Hybrid
  
  
BMC empowers nearly 80% of the Forbes Global 100 to accelerate business value, faster than humanly possible. Our industry-leading portfolio unlocks human and machine potential to drive business growth, innovation, and sustainable success. BMC does this in a simple and optimized way by connecting people, systems, and data that power the world’s largest organizations so they can seize a competitive advantage.
  
  
The IZOT product line includes BMC’s Intelligent Z Optimization & Transformation products, which help the world’s largest companies to monitor and manage their mainframe systems. The modernization of mainframe is the beating heart of our product line, and we achieve this goal by developing products that improve the developer experience, the mainframe integration, the speed of application development, the quality of the code and the applications’ security, while reducing operational costs and risks. We acquired several companies along the way, and we continue to grow, innovate, and perfect our solutions on an ongoing basis.
  
  
BMC is seeking an enthusiastic and dynamic Full Stack Developer to join the IMS Data Management R&D team. In this role, you will be responsible for development and maintenance of software products under the guidance of experts.
  
  
The IZOT IMS Data Management R&D team is involved in the development and maintenance of world class solutions that help the biggest global organizations across all major domains in efficiently managing their IMS environment which hold humongous amounts of data and manage their workloads to keep their business applications available, scalable, and reliable.
  
  
We are seeking a highly skilled and innovative Product Developer to join our team. We are looking for a developer who can think big and apply the design thinking process to tackle longstanding challenges in delivering simple, elegant solutions to complex, technology-focused needs for large organizations. The role requires a good knowledge of product domain, the Agile software development methodology and the process involved in product development and maintenance.
  
  
Here is how, through this exciting role, YOU will contribute to BMC's and your own success:
  
  
**In this role, you will:**  
Drive user-centered design solutions that deliver value and improve experiences to millions of users
  
Employ innovative and effective strategies to solve user interaction challenges that push creative boundaries
  
Create and maintain vision and design specifications, wire frames and interactive prototypes
  
Use design and analysis tools to define problem statements and drive solutions
  
Work closely with cross-functional/multi-disciplinary teams including visual designers, researchers, software architects, developers, and product managers to iteratively design concepts and interactions for our products.
  
Interact with customers and end users to better understand their needs and translating those needs into innovative solutions
  
Need to manage a mixed workload of multiple ongoing tasks including new function development and product maintenance.
  
  
To ensure you’re set up for success, you will bring the following skillset & experience:
  
  
3+ years of experience designing interactive user experiences for technology products that serve med-large customer bases
  
Experience in front-end development technologies (JavaScript, HTML5, CSS, Bootstrap)
  
Experience with Angular 2+ version is a must
  
Solid hands-on technical skills in Core Java and multi-threading
  
Problem solving using data structures and algorithms
  
Strong Object Oriented application design and development
  
Strong knowledge and experience with various DBMS (SQL Server, Oracle, DB2)
  
Experience with Jira/Agile development and source code management tools like GIT or ISPW
  
Expertise / familiarity in developing various type of scripts for effective use of popular test automation and DevOps tools like Jenkins, Selenium, RFT, UFT etc
  
Understanding of UX design standards and best practices.
  
Proficiency prototyping interactive designs using a variety of design tools and technologies
  
Strong analytical, communication and interpersonal skills.
  
Strong understanding and working knowledge of the software development process.
  
  
Whilst these are nice to have, our team can help you develop in the following skills:
  
  
Understanding of AI/ML, Gen AI technologies
  
Exposure to IT Service Management, ITIL, and operations within Enterprise IT support teams.
  
  
CA-DNP
  
  
Our commitment to you!
  
  
BMC’s culture is built around its people. We have 6000+ brilliant minds working together across the globe. You won’t be known just by your employee number, but for your true authentic self. BMC lets you be YOU!
  
  
If after reading the above, You’re unsure if you meet the qualifications of this role but are deeply excited about BMC and this team, we still encourage you to apply! We want to attract talents from diverse backgrounds and experience to ensure we face the world together with the best ideas!
  
  
BMC is committed to equal opportunity employment regardless of race, age, sex, creed, color, religion, citizenship status, sexual orientation, gender, gender expression, gender identity, national origin, disability, marital status, pregnancy, disabled veteran or status as a protected veteran. If you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the application and hiring process, visit the accommodation request page.
  
  
BMC Software maintains a strict policy of not requesting any form of payment in exchange for employment opportunities, upholding a fair and ethical hiring process.
  
  
At BMC we believe in pay transparency and have set the midpoint of the salary band for this role at 1,737,400 INR. Actual salaries depend on a wide range of factors that are considered in making compensation decisions, including but not limited to skill sets; experience and training, licensure, and certifications; and other business and organizational needs.
  
  
The salary listed is just one component of BMC's employee compensation package. Other rewards may include a variable plan and country specific benefits.
  
  
We are committed to ensuring that our employees are paid fairly and equitably, and that we are transparent about our compensation practices.
  
  
( Returnship@BMC )
  
  
Had a break in your career? No worries. This role is eligible for candidates who have taken a break in their career and want to re-enter the workforce. If your expertise matches the above job, visit to https://bmcrecruit.avature.net/returnship know more and how to apply.
